Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing expert Jim Crowley teaches us how to design and build our own rigs for every freshwater species.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin takes viewers to the top destinations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Stoked on Fishing crew takes you to the most amazing locations for some epic saltwater action.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim Crowley interviews top anglers and industry insiders from around the world of angling.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows how effective the drop shot can be on Bass during the extreme heat of Summer.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | When its Hot... Drop Shot!.mp4
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join the FishON! TV crew as we tackle rugged Northern Ontario terrain with our Polaris Ranger equipped with a custom boat rack. This remote expedition takes us deep into the wilderness to an untouched lake known for its walleye bounty. From the adrenaline of the journey to the thrill of the catch, this episode is packed with adventure, stunning scenery, and fishing tips you won’t want to miss!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Trailblazing to Trophy Walleye: Polaris Ranger Adventure
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank is headed to SC to spend a day with some of his favorites young pals at The Boy's Farm in Newberry. Hank & the boys target stripers on beautiful Lake Murray.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Fishing for stripers on Lake Murray
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Kids with life-threatenting illnesses are in need of help & hope. Today Hank shares his boat with Outdoor Dream Foundation.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Making dreams a reality
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank shares the water with some youth bass anglers. He teaches the anglers how to read and fish new water.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker goes after the fish on Lake Monticello with friend Bobby Williams.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker spends a day catching fish with well-known Christian author Dennis Rainey.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Grosse Savanne Bass Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank and close friend/business partner, Keith Kelly return to Hank's premiere signature lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Big Bass at Rockhouse Farms
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fom South Carolina to Texas, today's show covers 1,500 miles of bass fishing & baseball fun. Hank's grandson pitcher, Alec takes a break from sports camp to join "pawpaw."
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank sets out with two next-generation fishermen... high schoolers with a hunger for the outdoors. He shares his tricks of the trade as he & his young friends land some big bass using a variety baits.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker spends a day on Lake Hartwell chasing after the fish and sharing his boat with Outdoor Dream Foundation friends.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Season 8 Episode 3 kicks off our first open-water shoot of the year as Paul Ethier and Jeff Shippam make their way to the legendary Mattagami Lake for some classic spring walleye action. With competitive tournaments on pause this season, the guys revisit their favourite early-season hotspots—areas they’d normally fish under pressure—now with time to explore, adapt, and enjoy the day. From structure-hopping to dialing in the spring pattern, Paul and Jeff put their tournament instincts to work for a fun, relaxed day chasing hungry post-spawn walleye in Northern Ontario.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake

Image.alt: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake

Video.summary: In Episode 3, we navigate the serene waters of the Ivanhoe River, embracing the beauty of spring as we target post-spawn walleye. With rods in hand, we explore the river's productive fishing spots, uncovering the best techniques and tips for a successful catch in this transitional season. From scenic backdrops to thrilling strikes, this episode captures the essence of spring fishing at its finest.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Spring on the Ivanhoe: Post-Spawn Walleye Adventures
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A friendly Father and Son challenge, chasing big walleye in Longlac, Ontario, Canada
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Unsure of the path his life would take, Brad Peterson decided to join the U.S. Coast Guard. After saving many lives on the water as a part of rescue teams, Brad joined a new life-saving team as a nurse at the Minnesota VA. Today, we head out into the Gulf of Mexico to take Brad on his first saltwater fishing trip.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Coast Guard Veteran Brad Peterson
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Friend and fellow Michigander, Brian McCarter turns Kim on to a productive pattern for autumn largemouths. Suspended schools of bluegills set the stage for this informative episode. The Strike King Sexy Spoon is the featured lure.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The significance of baitfish size is investigated as Strike King Marketing Relationship Manager, Mark Copley accompanies Kim on Parksville Reservoir. The two cast a KVD Jerkbait for schooling spotted bass and discover a forage variance.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — A Matter of Size
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Extremely remote adventures on FishON! this season. Back to our roots with walleye fishing in Northern Ontario
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In the first season of Operation Fishing Freedom, we shared the story of a 37 month POW, Darrell Krenz. Now, we fly him to Texas to reconnect Darrell with Veteran Jack Goodwin. After the emotional surprise meeting, they reconnect and discuss their time alongside each other as 37 month POWs during the Korean War.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Korean War POW Jack Goodwin
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week we're out on winnebago looking for perch. come with us to learn the best tactics to catch delicious perch
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Smart Tactics for Fishing Perch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: At Alpena, Michigan, Shaw battles largemouth and smallmouth bass, plus "toothy critters."
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast — Michigan Mixed Bag
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jarrett and his guest Beau Meyer head to 10,000 feet elevation to catch some ice out Colorado trout. Its freezing but the fishing is hot!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Kim and his guest, Professional Angler Kevin Vida, demonstrate the attributes of Strike King's "Tour Grade Football Jigs and Ragetail Trailers". Late summer largemouth bass that position along weedlines in the fefatured pattern.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Ty Sjodin have so much fun in North Dakota where the feedbag is on.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Fantastic Fishing In North Dakota
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jeremy Smith and Jeff Simpson head to Eagle Lake in Sunset Country to cast for big muskies during the summer to fall transition
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Giant Eagle Lake Muskies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We share the story of Retired U.S. Air Force Veteran Jason Miller. Hear how his military career took him from Ground Zero on 9/11/2001, to Iraq, and eventually to the White House.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Air Force Veteran Jason Miller
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The night bite in Sturgeon Bay is on fire! In this week's episode, we’re meeting with our good friends Lonney Goman from Greenbay Trophy Fishing and Scott Meiller from Rebel Converting to catch some walleye. Hold onto your hineys folks, this will be a long night!
Video.title: Night Fishing Walleye

Video.summary: Shea McIntee and his brother Ryan McIntee explore the High Sierra lakes and catch three different trout species.
Video.title: Stoked On Fishing — The High Sierras, Pt. 3

Image.alt: Stoked On Fishing — The High Sierras, Pt. 3
Stoked On Fishing — The High Sierras, Pt. 3
Stoked On Fishing — The High Sierras, Pt. 3

Video.summary: Jim visits Cast Industries to see how lure molds are made. Then he visits Lure Parts Online to show you how to pour your own soft plastic baits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Making Lure Molds & Pouring soft plastics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bass fishing in late summer can be tough, watch as Dusing shows ways to overcome the tough conditions.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Late Summer Bass Smash
Video.title: Episode 1
